name: Hot Fudge Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate in the top of a double boiler.
2. Add the butter, sugar, and salt to the melted chocolate.
3. Stir in the boiling water until well combined.
4. Allow the mixture to boil for 3-4 minutes.
5. Remove from heat and stir in the vanilla extract.
6. Serve immediately.
